org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp.McpPage

Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp
Stateless Model Context Protocol (MCP) endpoint built on juneau-rest-server using the juneau-bean-mcp wire types.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> McpPage<T>
    McpCursor.page(List<T> all, String cursor, BeanStore ctx)
    Slices a descriptor list into a page returned from tools/list, prompts/list, or resources/list.
